channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Animalica - Foxes, Wolves & Hyenas
item.description: Adds Foxes, Wolves, and Hyenas as player choices!

item.title: Animalica - Bears
item.description: Adds Bears as player choices

item.title: Animalica - Small & Odd
item.description: Adds the small goober animals like raccoons, chickens, and rabbits as players

item.title: Animalica - Hooved Animals
item.description: Adds all the hooved animals as playable models!

item.title: Animalica - Compatibility
item.description: Adds a small list of modded animals as players!

item.title: Just Poop It
item.description: Everything poops... now your character does too.

item.title: Gromp's Specialized Classes Patches
item.description: A pack of content fixes for quilladile's Specialized Classes mod on Vintage Story 1.22+

item.title: ServerKits
item.description: Kits to claim on servers

item.title: Draconis
item.description: This mod adds 4 rideable dragons that the player can hatch and raise from eggs found in the wild

item.title: Toolsmith & Dolabra compatibilty
item.description: simple patch for the dolabra mod so it can be used with toolsmith.

item.title: Dumbwaiter
item.description: A medieval-style lift for moving between vertically-separated floors and storage transport.

item.title: MealRecipeLagFix
item.description: Fixes handbook lag when browsing meal recipe pages.

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Achievements
item.description: Adds vanilla, lore, AllClasses, Hod and Primitive Survival Achievements and random rewards

item.title: Arkhavia Class Patches
item.description: Class patches for Arkhavia.

item.title: Kaschperle Class Mix
item.description: A revision mix from the popular class mod Aldi classes and Agi's Classes

item.title: Envelopes
item.description: Adds wax-sealable envelopes to the game. Privacy-first.

item.title: Renderer Mangler
item.description: Custom cubemap renderer with different projections that allows up to 360 FOV

item.title: Gatbata's Sawians
item.description: Adds some of the Sawians from Gunsaw and Casualties: Unknown (expies and the like)

item.title: TDR medieval expansion tweaks
item.description: just the decorative blocks, no aurochs/cellar ice/waterwheels etc.

item.title: The Ultimate Mod Manager
item.description: A in-game mod manager that's suitable even for remote servers without terminal/FTP access.

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Mushroom Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing mushrooms!

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: TDR server immersive backpacks
item.description: some changes to immersive backpacks for the tdr server

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Launcher Mod Updater
item.description: When a world is loaded, it offers to download new updates for active mods.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: AoS | Armor Female Seraphs Compatability
item.description: Provides armor compatibility between female seraphs and various armor mods.

item.title: Oils! Resoaped Standalone
item.description: A content mod that adds plant oils & some alternative recipes, e.g. treating hides and quicklime.

item.title: Oils! Resoaped
item.description: A content mod that adds plant oils & some alternative recipes, e.g. treating hides and quicklime.
